## 自定义表单

Commonly used styles of ECharts, like shadow, opacity, color, border-color, border-width, and etc., are set by [itemStyle](https://echarts.apache.org/en/tutorial.html#series-pie.itemStyle) in series.

自定义表单

Commonly used styles of ECharts, like shadow, opacity, color, border-color, border-width, and etc., are set by itemStyle in series.
